situational_context: Running comeback day 74 (16 runs since May 3, 2026). NEW longest run: 8.0 km on Jul 15 (Run #16, suffer 57, avg HR 146 — highest effort of the comeback). On vacation in Saint-Malo (Jul 12-26) — no commuting, no sur site constraints. ACWR at 1.48 near comeback ceiling (1.50) but overnight HRV bounced to 45 ms (best in 2 weeks), indicating good physiological tolerance. VO2max running improved to 41.7 (from 38.3 at comeback start May 3). Chronic load 23.7, building steadily (from 17.5 on Jun 14). Weight unknown for 25 days (last: 103.67 kg on Jun 21); pesee scheduled Jul 19. Nutrition logging dormant since Jul 9. Vitamin D retest overdue (due ~July).

recommendations.text: Take 2 full rest days (Thu-Fri) before Saturday's Run #17. ACWR at 1.48 needs to settle. The overnight HRV bounce to 45 ms is encouraging, but tissue recovery from the longest run of the comeback (8 km, suffer 57) takes 48-72h at 103+ kg body weight.
recommendations.measurable: No activity logged Jul 16-17; ACWR should ease below 1.45 by Saturday morning

recommendations.text: Resume nutrition logging immediately. No data since Jul 9 (7 days). The pesee on Sunday and TDEE recalibrage depend on intake data. At 103+ kg with a -5 kg target, blindly eating through vacation risks stalling the weight trajectory.
recommendations.measurable: At least 2 meals logged per day starting Jul 16

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D retest before end of Saint-Malo vacation (Jul 26). Originally due ~July 2026. At last test (Dec 2025) level was 27 ng/mL (insufficient). Supplementation active for 7+ months — expect improvement but need to verify approaching 40 ng/mL target.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains > 1.45 after 2 rest days (by Saturday morning Jul 18)
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.48; 2 rest days should bring it below 1.45. If still elevated, Saturday Run #17 should be shortened to 5 km.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibia, plantar) >24h post Run #16 triggers skip of Run #17
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #16 was the longest of the comeback (8 km) with the highest suffer score (57). Tissue response unknown — critical gate for Saturday.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 34 ms
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 37 ms, recovered from 35. Sustained drop below 34 ms would indicate accumulated fatigue requiring load reduction.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Weigh on Sunday Jul 19 — flag if > 105 kg or < 100 kg (unexpected change in 25 days)
markers_to_watch.reason: No weighing for 25 days; trajectory was -1.5 kg/month. Need recalibration.
